# Project Copilot Skills

These project-level skills are designed for GitHub Copilot agent mode in VS Code and other Agent Skills-compatible tools.

Install location inside the repository:

```text
.github/skills/
```

Each subfolder contains a `SKILL.md` file plus optional references/templates.

## Included skills

- `csi-realtime-pipeline`
- `treadmill-station-calibration`
- `biomechanics-metric-contracts`
- `inferred-motion-views`
- `validation-import-alignment`
- `treadmill-session-replay-reporting`

## Why these skills

The global Copilot instructions and area-specific instructions tell Copilot how to behave broadly in this repository. These skills add deeper, task-specific playbooks that should only be loaded when relevant.
